fields.label: Frequency
fields.rationale: Monthly is the common case for recurring invoices / subscriptions. Daily / Weekly for shorter-cadence workflows.

fields.label: End date (empty = open-ended)
fields.rationale: Optional. When empty, Auto Repeat continues indefinitely (until disabled). Set to cap the schedule (e.g. a 12-month subscription).

fields.label: Submit the generated document automatically
fields.rationale: Only meaningful when reference_doctype is submittable. When 1, each generated copy is auto-submitted (docstatus=1) without manual review. Default 0 (generate as draft, user submits). Enable only for fully automated recurring flows.

fields.label: Repeat on last day of month (Monthly only)
fields.rationale: Only meaningful when frequency='Monthly'. When 1, each copy is generated on the LAST day of the month regardless of start_date's day. When 0, Monthly repeats on the same day-of-month as start_date, SKIPPING months with fewer days (e.g. a Jan 31 start skips Feb 28, Apr 30, etc.). Default 0.

fields.label: Notify recipients by email
fields.rationale: Default on: recipients receive an email whenever a new copy is generated. Disable for silent / invisible recurrence.

fields.label: Email recipients (one per line, when notify_by_email=1)
fields.rationale: Required when notify_by_email=1. One email address per line. Empty with notify_by_email=1 is accepted at save but silently drops the notification.

fields.label: Notification subject (Jinja)
fields.rationale: Jinja-templated over the target document. Empty falls back to 'New <DocType> generated from Auto Repeat'.

fields.label: Notification body (Jinja)
fields.rationale: Jinja-templated over the target document. Empty falls back to a generic message.

fields.label: Stamp auto_repeat field on generated copies
fields.rationale: When 1, each generated copy carries the Auto Repeat name in its `auto_repeat` field - this links copies back to the schedule. Default 1; disable only when that field would conflict.

fields.label: Disabled
fields.rationale: Default enabled. Disabled Auto Repeats skip generation but stay in the DB. Use instead of delete to pause a schedule.
